TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Niger namu a Nigeria sa na North Central i. Liyanan a tanedju, tanedju Minna a makakaulangan. Nukaljini a Bida, Kontagora, tamaya Suleja. Sangka 1976, tamavahec a North-Western a nangamu a Niger tamaya Sokoto. Maljangek tu naluzen, Nupe, Gbagyi, Kamuku, Kambari, tamaya Hausa a kangulu, asi Nupe a tamasudumangan a teremi.
S.PHON: nigər namu a nigəria sa na nurth ʦəntraɭ i. ɭijanan a tanəɉu, tanəɉu minna a makakauɭaŋan. nukaʎini a bida, kuntagura, tamaja suɭəja. saŋka ****, tamavahəʦ a nurth-wəstərn a naŋamu a nigər tamaja sukutu. maʎaŋək tu naɭuzən, nupə, gbagji, kamuku, kambari, tamaja hausa a kaŋuɭu, asi nupə a tamasudumaŋan a tərəmi.
S.FORM: Niger namu a Nigeria sa na North Central i. Liyanan a tanedju, tanedju Minna a makakaulangan. Nukaljini a Bida, Kontagora, tamaya Suleja. Sangka 1976, tamavahec a North-Western a nangamu a Niger tamaya Sokoto. Maljangek tu naluzen, Nupe, Gbagyi, Kamuku, Kambari, tamaya Hausa a kangulu, asi Nupe a tamasudumangan a teremi.
S.PHON: nigər namu a nigəria sa na nurth ʦəntraɭ i. ɭijanan a tanəɉu, tanəɉu minna a makakauɭaŋan. nukaʎini a bida, kuntagura, tamaja suɭəja. saŋka ****, tamavahəʦ a nurth-wəstərn a naŋamu a nigər tamaja sukutu. maʎaŋək tu naɭuzən, nupə, gbagji, kamuku, kambari, tamaja hausa a kaŋuɭu, asi nupə a tamasudumaŋan a tərəmi.
